spurious_features.label: ice
spurious_features.reason: Fires on 'received'; lexical artifact unrelated to profession.

spurious_features.label: his/he
spurious_features.reason: Gender pronoun; suppresses score, still spurious.

causal_features.label: engineer

causal_features.label: academic degrees

other_features.label: academic institutions

notes: Mostly causal, but with one clear spurious artifact and one gender marker suppressing score.
